queries.question: Do I need to submit a doctor's note for sick leave?
queries.generated_answer:

PolicyPilot provides 10 days of paid Sick Leave per year to cover personal illness, injury, or medical
appointments. Sick leave is credited upfront on January 1st of each calendar year. Unused sick leave does not
carry forward to the next year and cannot be cashed out upon termination. (leave_policy.pdf, Page 2)
